scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @pinocchio/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @pinocchio/canvas build && corepack pnpm --filter @pinocchio/plan build && corepack pnpm --filter @pinocchio/core build && corepack pnpm --filter @pinocchio/mcp-server build && corepack pnpm --filter @pinocchio/web build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @pinocchio/shared typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @pinocchio/canvas typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @pinocchio/plan typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @pinocchio/core typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @pinocchio/mcp-server typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @pinocchio/web typecheck
